zh.lifeSummary: 當George Abernethy 5th Laird of Saltoun於1340年4月1日出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安哈丁頓時，他的父親George Abernethy 4th of Saltoun31歲，母親Alicia Wishart17歲。他和Mary Graham至少有1個兒子。他去世於1388年8月19日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德奧特波恩享年48歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德奧特波恩。

nameMeanings.name: Abernethy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Abernathy
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Abernethy in southeastern Perthshire. The placename is of Pictish origin, meaning ‘mouth of the river Nethy’.

History: This was the name of a cadet branch of MacDuff earls of Fife and one of the surnames of the Scots who settled in northern Ireland during the ‘plantation’ in the 17th century, and it was brought to the US as the name of a Southern plantation owner (in a different sense of the word ‘plantation’).

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When George Abernethy 5th Laird of Saltoun was born on 1 April 1340, in Haddington, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, George Abernethy 4th of Saltoun, was 31 and his mother, Alicia Wishart, was 17. He had at least 1 son with Mary Graham. He died on 19 August 1388, in Otterburn, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Otterburn, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Abernethy 5th Laird of Saltoun est né le 1 avril 1340, à Haddington, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, George Abernethy 4th of Saltoun, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alicia Wishart, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mary Graham. Il est décédé le 19 août 1388, à Otterburn, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Otterburn, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Abernethy 5th Laird of Saltoun am 1. April 1340 in Haddington, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Abernethy 4th of Saltoun 31 und seine Mutter Alicia Wishart 17. Er hatte mit Mary Graham mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 19. August 1388 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Otterburn, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Otterburn, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Abernethy 5th Laird of Saltoun è nato il il 1 aprile 1340 nel Haddington, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, George Abernethy 4th of Saltoun, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Alicia Wishart, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mary Graham. Morì il 19 agosto 1388, nel Otterburn, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Otterburn, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: George Abernethy 5th Laird of Saltounが1340年4月1日にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンハッドイントンで生まれた時，父George Abernethy 4th of Saltounは31歳，母Alicia Wishartは17歳であった。彼はMary Grahamとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1388年8月19日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドオッテルブルンで48歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドオッテルブルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: George Abernethy 5th Laird of Saltoun(이)가 1340년 4월 1일 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 하딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Abernethy 4th of Saltoun(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Alicia Wishart(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Mary Graham(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1388년 8월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 오터번에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 오터번에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mary Graham. ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Abernethy 5th Laird of Saltoun родился 1 апреля 1340 г. в местности хаддингтон, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени George Abernethy 4th of Saltoun было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alicia Wishart, 17. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mary Graham. Он умер 19 августа 1388 г. в местности оттирбурн, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности оттирбурн, нортумбирланд, Англия.
